body: JGM Group builds homes and commercial spaces across the Greater Toronto Area and Southern Ontario that are engineered to last. Every project runs through a single accountable team — from the first survey stake to the final walkthrough.
No handoffs to unknown subs, no surprise change orders buried in fine print — just disciplined scheduling, honest budgets, and craftsmanship built to stand the test of time.

process.title: Consult & scope
process.description: We walk the site, understand the vision, and define a clear scope before anyone quotes a number.

process.title: Plan & price
process.description: Detailed drawings, a firm itemized budget, and a schedule you can hold us to.

process.title: Build & manage
process.description: One project lead runs the trades, permits, and inspections start to finish.

process.title: Walk & warranty
process.description: A full walkthrough, punch list, and a written warranty on our work.

services.title: Custom Homes
services.description: Architect-led new builds tailored to your site and lifestyle, from foundation to final finish.

services.title: Full Home Renovations
services.description: Whole-home transformations that reconfigure and modernize your space without losing its character.

services.title: Kitchen Remodeling
services.description: Functional, beautiful kitchens — cabinetry, counters, and layouts built around how you cook.

services.title: Bathroom Remodeling
services.description: Spa-quality bathrooms with proper waterproofing, quality fixtures, and clean, lasting finishes.

services.title: Tile Installation
services.description: Precision tile for floors, walls, and showers — properly prepped, waterproofed, and set to last.

services.title: Basement Finishing
services.description: Turn unused lower levels into living space — suites, rec rooms, and offices, permitted and code-compliant.

services.title: Commercial Renovations
services.description: Tenant improvements and buildouts sequenced to keep your business running while the work gets done.

services.title: General Contracting
services.description: Full-scope project management — permits, trades, scheduling, and inspections — under one contract and one point of contact.

forms.subject: New project enquiry — JGM Group website
